recentMessages.text:
9: Armies deployed. Here is what is running right now:

Track 1 — Hardening:
• Tee: Building containerization plan (CIO-grade, Docker/K8s)
• Agent: Updating security audit (credential inventory, network exposure, recommendations)
• FORT + SCOUT: Available for additional hardening
Hey you have some pretty scary looking emails and telegram spam stacking up too
9: ALERT: Kyle Cabezas is calling on FaceTime RIGHT NOW. Accept with video, accept with audio, or decline? The call notification is on screen.

9: Kyle C call went to voicemail/dismissed. FYI in case you want to call him back.

Meanwhile Ara delivered initial research on the top 5 products with TAM, ARR projections, and priority rankings. 134 sources pulled. Her Council is now deep researching the remaining 5. Hardening
